title: Convert JSON Object to YAML Mapping
cap_description: Convert a JSON object to a YAML mapping
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a single JSON object into a YAML mapping. Use this when a downstream cap or configuration system expects a YAML mapping but the upstream produces a JSON object.

## Inputs

A JSON object (record).

## Outputs

A YAML mapping.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless for all JSON types that YAML supports.
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML Mapping to JSON Object](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;record;textable").
- For arrays of objects, use [Convert JSON Array of Objects to YAML List of Mappings](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;list;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;record;textable;yaml").
